acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Test-owned subprocesses are cleaned on every ExUnit outcome
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Unique environment ownership plus on_exit bounded TERM/KILL cleanup applies to pass, failure, timeout and interruption.
Selection requires an exact unique SYMPHONY_TEST_PROCESS_OWNER value in the child environment.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: FIFO and Git push leak sites use the common lifecycle
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Restart hooks, workspace timeouts and real candidate/workspace Git pushes are tagged before launch.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Complete gates leave no owned child
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: 332 tests and all gates passed; post-gate /proc scan reported owned_processes=0.

summary: Orchestration tests now tag, terminate, reap and assert absence of their own operating-system children.
